hero.title: Bedo Mang'won
hero.lead: IATF tiyo e lela. Yiero mag chenro, lokruok mag chike, lokruoge mag loch, kod nengo mag tich ondiki e kuonde ma ji nitie.

items: Yiero mag timo tij gedo. Yiero mag rwako, kano, kod loko, ikwano kaka weche michiwo e kar kano weche madwarore, kendo iketo e ripode mag sirkal. kar kwan-giMano ok nyal timore.

Kwa mondo oornegi barupe. Rekod mag kwayo mag ji duto okan e riwruok mar IATF GitHub, e websaitni, kata giduto. Rekodgo nyalo choko, rieyo, kata loso kendo kwayo ma ne okwong go mondo oyud thuolo mar nonogi ma ok oketo weche ma ok ochuno e pach ng'ato. Yiero mag ywaruok itero e rekod mar ji duto sama gichiwo paro e wi chenro moro kata e wi kaka itiyo gi sirkal. Rekodi mag kwayo ok yudre e nonro mar masinde mag manyo weche ka mano nyalore. Nen rekod: kwayo mar gocho mokwongo pod ni nyime.
Kode olokore. Lokruok moro amora mar kod oket e lela e kar kano weche madwarore. Ne IATF Riwruok mar GitHubMano ok nyal timore.
Lokruok kuom kaka itiyo gi sirkal. Updates to the governance page are tracked as commits to the websait mar IATF Ng'i kar kano weche. kwano weche machon e GitHub.
Pesa ma itiyogo e timo ohala. IATF oketo nengo mar tich piny kendo ondiko pesa ma itiyo godo e weche mag gedo. Chakre higa mar 2022, nengo maduong' ma itiyogo en nying' mar domain.
Ndiko mag ikruok. Weche mowach kuom nono kata ng'ado paro moro amora mochanore odak e GitHub Wuoyo e wi kar kano weche mowinjore neno Mbaka kuom websait mar IATF kar kano weche.

header.title: Weche ma nyiso kaka itiyo gi masindno

paragraphs: IATF oketo chenro mar tiyo gi gige gedo e okang' matin. Chakre higa mar 2022, nengo maduong' mosiko mar tiyo kodgi osebedo nying' mag gwenge.
Ndikoni ok en kwano mar pesa ma osetimne nonro, to en buk ma nyiso kaka itiyo gi masinde ma konyo IATF tiyo e intanet.
operatingCosts.footnote: Adres mag ng'ato, weche motudore gi chulo osuru, kod weche mamoko ma ok ochuno e wi akaunt, ok yudre e ofise mag sirkal.

items.label: Weche Momedore
items.value: Nengo mar domain ne ochul gi mugiwarafx. Hosting ne otiyo gi chenro mar free-tier kata low-cost infrastructure kokalo kuom Cloudflare. iatf.cc gwelo.

items.label: Weche Momedore
items.value: Domain cost ma mugiwarafx ema chulo.

items.label: Weche Momedore
items.value: Nengo mar domain ne ochul gi mugiwarafx. Hosting ne otiyo gi chenro mar free-tier kata low-cost ka itiyo gi Vercel.

items.label: Weche Momedore
items.value: Domain cost ma mugiwarafx ema chulo.

items.label: Weche Momedore
items.value: Nengo mar domain ne ochul gi mugiwarafx. Hosting ne otiyo gi chenro mar free-tier kata low-cost infrastructure kokalo kuom GitHub Pages.

header.title: Gima ok en mar ji duto

paragraphs: Moko kuom gik ma ondik e bugego ok yudre e ofise mag sirkal nikech:
items: Weche ma ng'ato nyalo tudorego gi ng'at mochiwo parono.
Barupe ma ng'ato ondiko ka en kende mondo okonye ng'eyo gima odwaro kapok orwake, okwede, kata choko weche ma odwaro.
Adres ma ng'ato owuon odakie, namba simu, koda weche mamoko maok ochuno.
Gimoro amora manyalo konyo ng'ato ng'eyo ni en ng'at ma tiyo gi teknoloji makonyo, ka ok oyiene timo kamano.
Wuoche mag Raw Discord, mak mana ka wach moro oter e rekod mar tijno.

header.title: Chenro mar tayo weche en buk moting'o chike moket e tok rekodgi

paragraphs: Ka idwaro ng'eyo kaka itiyo gi gik moko e rwako, kano, kata loko migawo, som governance page.
